sections.name: Entrees and tacos
items: Al Pastor taco - free-range pork, marinated in chiles and spices
Crispy Chicken Tinga taco - crispy breast, stewed thigh on red guajillo tortillas
Carne Asada taco - chopped arracher steak, charred onions and jalapeno
Baja Crispy Fish taco - beer-battered cod, poblano mayo, pico de gallo
Beef Birria taco - Jalisco brisket and Chihuahua cheese, served with broth
Seared Fish taco - cod marinated with herbs and garlic, topped with cabbage
Sinaloa Shrimp taco - melted cheese, avocado, pickled onions
Avocado Tostada - black beans, pickled red onion, Cotija cheese
Black Bean and Sweet Potato taco - Cotija cheese and chile salsa
Lunchtime Taco Plato - choose two tacos with rice and beans

sections.name: Drinks and notes
items: Pina Colada - rum, coconut, pineapple juice

notes: Stored from a user paste so future rescans can use the pasted Tacombi menu text without refetching the website.
User confirmed this same menu applies to both Tacombi and Tacombi Fulton Market.

The pasted menu does not explicitly mention tree nuts or peanuts in the food menu, but it does include coconut in the pina colada and uses shared prep language only through a standard raw or undercooked foods warning.
